issues.description: TrashFromHand trashes from hand, but effect requires trashing from top of deck. Should use TrashFromDeck or similar.
Missing condition: 'If you have 15 or more cards in your trash' is not represented. Should have condition type TrashCount with threshold >= 15.
Action missing prerequisite: 'You may trash this Character' must be a cost/requirement before the DON attachment action can execute.
Target must be 'rested DON!! card' (existing DON already on board), not a new DON attachment. Action type and target scope are incorrect.
